nodes.label: AI as research assistant for information gathering
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly use AI to research and find information specific to the topic I need

nodes.label: AI as lesson planning and content creation tool
nodes.grounding_span: using that information to form lesson plans and create questions for students to answer

nodes.label: AI as knowledge refresher for teaching confidence
nodes.label_negative: Reliance on memory without AI support
nodes.grounding_span: Using AI to help refresh my knowledge so I feel confident in teaching the information

nodes.label: AI as potential homework marker
nodes.grounding_span: It would be nice to use AI to help mark homework for example

nodes.label: Personal creative control over lesson design
nodes.grounding_span: I do like to create my lessons plans on my own and create worksheets

nodes.label: Face-to-face teaching as irreplaceable human domain
nodes.grounding_span: childhood studies has shown the importance of teaching face to face

nodes.label: Teaching effectiveness and student engagement
nodes.grounding_span: get the conversation about the topic going

nodes.label: Professional confidence and knowledge mastery
nodes.grounding_span: feel confident in teaching the information

nodes.label: Time efficiency and workload management
nodes.grounding_span: leaving less time to research and create lessons plans

nodes.label: Personal creativity and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I like to be creative so I focus in that area

nodes.label: Human connection in education
nodes.grounding_span: the importance of teaching face to face

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for knowledge refresh
nodes.grounding_span: Using AI to help refresh my knowledge so I feel confident in teaching the information made me feel satisfied

nodes.label: Openness to expanding AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I could see AI taking more of a role in my work

nodes.label: Preference for personal creativity over AI
nodes.grounding_span: I do like to create my lessons plans on my own and create worksheets

nodes.label: Confidence in human teaching irreplaceability
nodes.grounding_span: I am not too concerned about AI in that regard

nodes.label: Structured sequential inquiry — builds understanding layer by layer
nodes.grounding_span: First I would ask AI to gather key information... Making note of the response I will ask the AI model to gather information about the Romans presence in the UK

nodes.label: Task-dependent interaction pattern — varies between one-off and continuous use
nodes.grounding_span: Depending on the type of lesson and topic I may use it continuously to research
